rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary: Seminar III will focus on myths surrounding pronunciation instruction and the application of second language research in debunking these myths. The seminar will be divided into three units. The first introductory unit will examine the myth that older learners with 'fossilized' speech are unable to improve intelligibility. Unit two will examine research into intonation instruction and its effectiveness. The final unit will involve an analysis of research into accent reduction and pronunciation instruction, determining if there is a distinction between the two.
aims: To critically examine and debunk the myth that older language learners are incapable of improving their pronunciation, exploring relevant second language research and providing participants with insights into effective strategies for enhancing intelligibility in older learners. The zemi also seeks to conduct a comprehensive analysis of second language research related to accent reduction and pronunciation instruction. Participants will explore whether there is a distinction between these two concepts and will critically assess the efficacy of different methods in achieving desired outcomes.
goals: To critically examine and debunk the myths surrounding the teaching and learning of pronunciation in EFL and ESL classrooms.

plan.text: Introduction to themes to be covered in semester and distribution of reading material.
Discussion of myths surrounding pronunciation and pronunciation instruction.
Unit 1. "Learners with 'fossilized' speech are unable to improve intelligibility".
Unit 2. "Research into intonation instruction and its effectiveness".
Unit 3."An analysis of research into accent reduction and pronunciation instruction".

textbooks: All materials will be provided by the teacher.
prereq: Students should have a reasonable understanding of English to comprehend a seminar held in English.
prep: Students will be required to review content of seminars outside of class and to read in preparation for future seminars.
teachers: ◎ ショーン バーゴイン
